prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜（校本部）2026年约第62名，近年排名稳定在50–70区间，属中上游211；声 誉与抖音热度数据中未见该校明显舆情信号，整体关注度平稳；无投档断档记录，报考心理无明显扰动；该校以石油石化特色为主，校本部石油与天然气工程为 优势学科；克拉玛依校区共享校本部学科资源，对工科考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 相关工科专业（石油工程、计算机类、自动化等）社会热度平稳；湖南省2026 年物理类考生约34.7万人，较2025年32.0万人增加约8.4%，竞争加剧；学校位于新疆克拉玛依市，距湖南较远，地域偏好 对湖南考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势惯性、2026年物理类考生增加8.4%而计划仅 扩招3.5%的供需偏紧格局，以及学校地处偏远对报考热度的压制，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准上继续小幅后移。预测最低位次约49855名，区间49355–50355名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 41745 → 44908 → 39598 → 37119 → 48625, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend; in 2025, it shifted back by about 11506 places compared to 2024, the largest fluctuation in five years, with a baseline ranking of about 48625; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 61 in 2021, 59 in 2022, 62 in 2023, 77 in 2024, and 85 in 2025, increasing year by year; the 2026 plan is 88, an increase of 3 students (+3.5%) compared to 2025, and the small expansion has limited relief on competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; on the Soft Science main ranking (main campus) in 2026, it is approximately 62nd, with rankings stable in the 50–70 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; in reputation and Douyin popularity data, no significant public opinion signals were observed for this school, with overall attention stable; no record of admission gaps, and no obvious psychological disturbance in application behavior; the school is mainly characterized by petroleum and petrochemical specialties, with the main campus's petroleum and natural gas engineering as advantageous disciplines; the Karamay Campus shares the main campus's disciplinary resources, attracting some engineering students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Related engineering majors (petroleum engineering, computer science, automation, etc.) have stable social popularity; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% compared to 325,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; the school is located in Karamay City, Xinjiang, far from Hunan, and regional preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on the willingness of Hunan examinees to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the inertia of the significant downward trend in rankings in 2025, the tight supply-demand situation with an 8.4% increase in Physics Category examinees in 2026 but only a 3.5% expansion in enrollment plan, and the suppression of application popularity due to the school's remote location, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift back slightly from the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 49855, with a range of 49355–50355.

Popular majors such as computer science and artificial intelligence are more competitive, requiring rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range for a higher chance.
